body.title: Retire wg_cooccur, wg_edges, and graph_cache write paths
body.result: reinforce_text() no-op; top_hubs/bridge_words return []; graph_cache.py deleted; m062 archives wg_cooccur+wg_edges tables
body.intention: I intend that wg_cooccur and wg_edges are fully retired once spreading activation runs through the memory graph.
body.description:
After T-wg-spread-via-cortex closes, retire the flat wg_cooccur (29M rows) and wg_edges (1.1M rows) tables plus the graph_cache Redis layer. Key scope: kill all WRITE paths — reinforce_text() in word_graph.py, callers in voice_ab.py, coactivation_counter.py, and main.py — not just reads. Archive tables (rename to _archive) for 90 days before proposing DROP.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/word_graph.py (remove reinforce_text wg_cooccur writes; redirect reinforcement to links_weighted update on WORD_GRAPH memory nodes), devices/igor/memory/graph_cache.py (retire — no-op stub or delete), devices/igor/cognition/voice_ab.py (remove reinforce_text call or redirect), devices/igor/cognition/coactivation_counter.py (same), devices/igor/main.py (same), devices/igor/memory/cortex.py (migration: ALTER TABLE wg_cooccur RENAME TO wg_cooccur_archive)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; archive before drop (90-day window); kill write paths, not just reads
**Scope boundary:** IN: remove wg_cooccur/wg_edges read+write paths; retire graph_cache.py; rename tables to _archive. OUT: DROP TABLE (separate ops ticket after 90 days)
**Completion criteria:** grep confirms no direct SELECT/UPDATE on wg_cooccur or wg_edges in word_graph.py; graph_cache.py deleted or no-op; reinforcement (voice_ab, coactivation_counter, main.py) routes to WORD_GRAPH memory node updates or is explicitly removed; full igor test suite passes.
